name: Autologous mitochondrial transplantation ECMO trial remains recruiting
summary: The Boston Children's Hospital ClinicalTrials.gov record for autologous mitochondrial transplantation after ischemia in pediatric ECMO patients remained recruiting as of the June 3, 2026 review.
significance_note: Useful clinical-translation context, but the registry has no posted results and remains an acute pediatric ischemia-reperfusion context rather than an aging trial.
